home.title: Tournament Manager
home.subtitle: Create and manage tennis tournaments, or view ongoing matches as a guest or staff
home.footer: Track your tennis tournaments with ease

manager.title: Manager
manager.description: Sign in to create and manage tournaments

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to manage tournaments

signup.title: Create an account
signup.subtitle: Get started with tournament management
signup.name: Name
signup.inviteCodePlaceholder: Enter the invite code from your admin

tournaments.title: Tournaments
tournaments.subtitle: Create and manage your tennis tournaments

empty.title: No tournaments yet
empty.description: Create your first tournament to get started with managing matches and tracking results.

notFound.title: Tournament not found
notFound.description: The tournament you're looking for doesn't exist or you don't have permission to view it.
notFound.guestDescription: This tournament doesn't exist or is not available for public viewing. Only active and completed tournaments can be viewed.

header.staffCodeDescription: Share this code with staff members to grant them access to manage matches
header.codeGeneratedDescription: Share this code with your staff members. They can use it to access this tournament.
header.staffAccessUrl: Staff can access this tournament at:
header.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this tournament?

create.title: Create Tournament
create.subtitle: Set up a new tennis tournament in a few easy steps

basics.title: Tournament Details
basics.description: Enter the basic information about your tournament
basics.selectVenuesDescription: Choose courts to use for this tournament
basics.noCourts: No courts registered yet. Register a court to get started.
basics.venuesSelected: {count, plural, one {# venue selected} other {# venues selected}}

format.title: Tournament Format
format.description: Choose between qualifying rounds or direct main draw
format.includeQualifyingDescription: Teams compete in groups before the main draw
format.totalParticipantsDescription: Total number of teams competing in the qualifying round
format.tiebreakerDescription: When teams have the same wins/losses, this determines how to break the tie
format.unevenDistribution: Uneven distribution: some groups have fewer teams
format.advancingSummary: Top {top} per group → {total} teams in main draw
format.minTeamsWarning: Each group needs at least 2 teams. Reduce the number of groups.
format.directMainDrawDescription: Teams will compete directly in a single-elimination bracket

teams.title: Add Teams
teams.importTitle: Import teams from CSV or Excel
teams.importDescription: Upload a CSV or XLSX file with team names in the first column, or include a header column named name.
teams.exceedError: Appending would exceed the expected team count ({count}). Please remove some teams first or enable Replace.

review.title: Review & Create
review.description: Review your tournament settings before creating
review.venuesSummary: {venues, plural, one {# venue} other {# venues}} · {courts} total courts
review.advancingSummary: Top {top} per group → {total} in main draw

addVenue.title: Add New Venue
addVenue.description: Register a venue with multiple courts that can be shared across tournaments.
addVenue.numCourtsDescription: How many individual courts are at this venue

venues.title: Venues
venues.subtitle: Register and manage venues with multiple courts

empty.title: No venues registered
empty.description: Register venues with courts to use them in your tournaments. Venues can be shared across multiple tournaments.

delete.title: Delete Venue
delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
delete.warning: This venue is currently assigned to {count} tournament(s). You must remove it from all tournaments before deleting.

guest.title: Browse Tournaments
guest.subtitle: View ongoing and completed tennis tournaments
guest.searchPlaceholder: Search by tournament or court name...
guest.noMatchSearch: No tournaments match "{search}". Try a different search term.
guest.noTournamentsText: There are no active or completed tournaments to view at the moment.

staff.title: Staff Tournament Access
staff.subtitle: View and manage tournaments with staff access codes
staff.searchPlaceholder: Search by tournament or court name...
staff.noMatchSearch: No tournaments match "{search}". Try a different search term.
staff.noTournamentsText: There are no active or completed tournaments to view at the moment.
staff.verifyAccessPrompt: Please verify your access code to continue.

verification.title: Staff Access Required
verification.description: Enter the verification code to access "{name}"
verification.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

courtView.noMatchesDescription: Generate matches first to start scheduling games on courts.
courtView.dragMatchHelp: Drag a match to a court slot, or click to select
courtView.startedCount: Started {count, plural, one {# match} other {# matches}}

notStartedNotice.title: Tournament has not started yet
notStartedNotice.description: Matches cannot be assigned to courts until the tournament has started. Click the 'Start Tournament' button at the top to begin.
notStartedNotice.toast: Please start the tournament first. Matches cannot be assigned to courts before it starts.

assignMatch.title: Assign Match to Court
assignMatch.allCourtsInUse: All courts are currently in use

replaceMatch.title: Replace Scheduled Match?
replaceMatch.description: {venue} Court #{court} already has a match. Replace it?

enterResult.title: Enter Match Result
enterResult.subtitle: Enter the final score
enterResult.scoresTied: Scores are tied. Enter a valid winner score.

autoSchedule.title: Generate Initial Schedule
autoSchedule.description: Automatically assign all pending matches to courts and time slots. Matches already on court or completed are not affected.
autoSchedule.mainAfterQualifying: Start main draw right after qualifying ends
autoSchedule.rangeHelper: {count, plural, one {# court} other {# courts}} selected
autoSchedule.totalSelected: Total: {count, plural, one {# court} other {# courts}}
autoSchedule.noCourtsSelected: Please select at least one court
autoSchedule.invalidDuration: Match duration must be greater than 0
autoSchedule.overwriteWarning: Note: Existing pending court assignments will be replaced. Matches already on court or completed are kept.
autoSchedule.successToast: Schedule generated for {count, plural, one {# match} other {# matches}}

timeline.subtitle: Initial court schedule. Edits during the tournament are not reflected here.
timeline.dragHint: Drag a match cell to move or swap it.
timeline.changeNotice: The schedule may change. Please check the announcement channel for the latest updates.
timeline.emptyDescription: Use "Auto Schedule" on the court view to generate an initial schedule.

drawView.noMatchesDescription: Generate matches to view the tournament draw and bracket.
drawView.noMatchesReadonlyDescription: The tournament draw hasn't been generated yet.
drawView.topAdvance: Top {count} team(s) advance to main draw
drawView.noMatchesInGroup: No matches in this group yet
drawView.mainDrawNotStartedDescription: Complete qualifying rounds or generate the main draw bracket.
drawView.mainDrawNotStartedDescriptionReadonly: The main draw bracket hasn't been generated yet.
drawView.placeholderRank: {rank, selectordinal, one {#st} two {#nd} few {#rd} other {#th}} of Group {group}
